currentGoals: Build MentorOS as a long-term AI product and judgment-training project.
Explore AI product design with serious human tone and memory.
Balance MentorOS with transfer-major preparation and coursework.
productPreferences: Natural language with real conversation texture.
Clear judgment instead of neutral template output.
Default advanced Agents with distinct reasoning styles.
Memory should be recalled naturally and only when useful.

knownProjects.name: MentorOS
knownProjects.description: An intellectual dialogue system with long-term memory, humane language texture, and multi-agent council discussion.

blindSpots: The user can make first-version project scope too large.
The user may over-design the system before proving the core conversation loop.
communicationPreferences: Dislike template-like output and report cadence.
Prefer questions that sharpen the next decision.
Prefer grounded disagreement over oily encouragement.
